course_title: RESPONSIBLE CONDUCT OF RESEARCH FOR BIOMEDICAL ENGINEERS
description: Develop an understanding of the elements involved in being a responsible member of the Biomedical Engineering research community. Topics include mentor/mentee relationships, identifying research problems, research integrity, ethics, regulations, and improving the scientific climate.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Biomedical Engineering, Ph.D. or Biomedical Engineering: Research, M.S.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Biomedical Engineering, Ph.D. or Biomedical Engineering: Research, M.S.
